\tzpentry{ID3574}{Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3574 introduces Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Psi(\theta,\lambda,t)=A_d\cos\theta \;+\; \frac{\Gamma_N}{4\pi}\ln(1-\cos\theta) \;+\; B\;Y_{3}^{2}(\theta,\lambda)\,e^{i\omega_{3,2} t}, \]
